operatorPrincipleTitle: Owners stay focused on bids, crews, and cash flow.
operatorPrincipleBody: The Operator handles inbound bid requests, vendor follow-up, site appointments, task routing, CRM updates, and exception escalation.
operatorPrincipleMetricDetail: of coordination actions handled before owner involvement.
todaySummaryBody: Bid leads triaged, site walks booked, subcontractor tasks created, reminders sent, and only risky issues escalated.

activityFeed.summary: Created RFI task for project manager
Booked site walk for warehouse buildout
Updated project stage and estimator notes

messages.speaker: Prospect
messages.message: Can you price a warehouse buildout if we send plans today?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Yes. I can collect drawings, timeline, site access, and decision criteria so the estimator can review quickly.

messages.speaker: Subcontractor
messages.message: We can cover Thursday but need final scope.

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: I logged that and created a scope confirmation task for the PM.

tasks.title: Confirm site walk for Atlas Warehousing
Review margin on Metro Dental change order

appointments.title: Owner review: Metro Dental change order

escalations.title: Margin-risk change order
escalations.why: Client requested custom terms that could compress gross margin.
escalations.next: Owner should approve pricing posture before reply.
escalations.draft: We can review the change order, but I want to confirm the scope and pricing impact before committing.

escalations.title: Compressed project timeline
escalations.why: Prospect requested start date inside crew availability window.
escalations.next: Confirm crew capacity and owner appetite before promising schedule.
escalations.draft: The timeline may be possible, but I need to confirm crew availability and lead times first.

demoScenario.title: Live Demo Scenario
steps: Operator qualifies and books site walk
Owner is notified only if margin or timeline risk appears

events.summary: Escalation created because timeline risk was detected
